query: What file I/O operations does SPICE support?
answer: The context only shows opening a new text file for write access using `TXTOPN` [file:3-381]. The `OPEN` statement includes `UNIT`, `FILE`, `FORM` (FORMATTED), `ACCESS` (SEQUENTIAL), `STATUS` (NEW), and `IOSTAT` [file:3-381]. `SPAT2B` converts SPICE transfer format files into their equivalent binary formats [file:3-419].
